debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet)

failed_attempts:
rintro v ⟨e, he, hve⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ P.edgeSet
  · have : v ∉ {P.first, P.last} :=
      not_or.mpr ⟨fun hf ↦ h.first_not_in (hf ▸ ⟨e, he, hve⟩), fun hl ↦ h.last_not_in (hl ▸ ⟨e, he, hve⟩)⟩
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hne⟩ := P.exists_ne_edge_of_mem_edge_of_not_mem_endpoints e heP hve this
    exact ⟨f, symmDiff_mem_right hfP (fun hf ↦ (hM.disjoint he hf hne).le_bot ⟨hve, hfv⟩), hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, symmDiff_mem_left heP he, hve⟩
